message:
refactor(scheduler): replace std DefaultHasher with DetHasher for deterministic certificate hashing

ScheduleCertificate accumulated a rolling hash of all scheduling decisions
using std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher, whose output is explicitly
not guaranteed to be stable across Rust compiler versions. This meant that
certificate hashes computed on different toolchain versions could diverge,
silently breaking cross-version replay verification and audit trails.

Switches to the project's own DetHasher (deterministic hasher with a fixed
seed) so certificate hashes are identical regardless of rustc version. Also
removes the now-unused DefaultHasher import.

Adds a regression test (certificate_uses_deterministic_hasher) that verifies
identical event sequences always produce identical non-zero hashes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
